ddt:Target.Name: R_AVM_SUV_SW3.0
ddt:Target.Description:
[4] 2019/01/28 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Added Item : WS. Modified Item : CF.
[3] 2018/12/26 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified DID: F1A2 --> F188
[2] 2018/12/21 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Added item : CF.
[1] 2018/08/21 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified Failures 6 items and DM 2 items. Added Failures 27 items and DM 4 items.
[N] 2018/08/03 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Initial Creation.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level OutOfRange/0 adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed / blocked

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Item.Text: Factory Self Calibration Master data checking
Select view at Top view adjust/Zoom image

Data.Name: Factory Self Calibration Master data checking.value

Item.Text: Change to "Copying by FOTA-Gateways in progress"

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: The calibration master data which are targeted for Master Data transfer
DataRead_0303.Rear camera height rear camera height
DataRead_0304.IPA parking position adjust revision level X
DataRead_0304.IPA parking position adjust revision level Y
DataRead_0304.IPA parking position adjust revision level theta
DataRead_0305.PSM parking position adjust revision level X
DataRead_0305.PSM parking position adjust revision level Y
DataRead_0305.PSM parking position adjust revision level theta
DataRead_0306.Page number of data during the Master Data transfer
DataRead_0306.Maximum Page number for the Master Data transfer
DataRead_0306.The calibration master data which are targeted for Master Data transfer
DataRead_051A.4 Average vehicle speed after filter application of wheel pulses

Item.Text: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC(00h)
Camera does not have calibration information(03h)

Data.Name: DataRead_F0A4.Read the result of SMC command 1
DataRead_F0A4.Read the result of SMC command 2
DataRead_F0A4.Read the result of SMC command 3
DataRead_F0A4.Read the result of SMC command 4

DataRead_0601.The Left side param Y axis
DataRead_0602.The Right side param X axis
DataRead_0602.The Right side param Y axis
Select view at Top view adjust_Zoom image.value
DataRead_0606.Right side param Left rotatory direction
DataRead_0605.Left side param Right rotatory direction
DataRead_0606.Right side param Left Y axis
DataRead_0606.Right side param Left X axis
DataRead_0605.Left side param Right X axis
DataRead_0605.Left side param Right Y axis

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery
No possible classification about the type of fault
